name: Tuverel Balancing GA Lotion with Glycylglycine 6%
pros: Exceptional value at ¥2,000 for a scientifically-formulated pore and sebum control lotion
Dual-award winner (Best Cosme 2024) with 2,264 reviews showing real user validation
Glycylglycine + azelaic acid derivative targets pores, texture, and mild inflammation effectively
cons: Japanese-only labeling and instructions make it less accessible for English-speaking newcomers
2,000+ reviews mean some batches may vary in consistency or packaging quality
shortDescription: Award-winning pore-control lotion with proven ingredients at an unbeatable price point.
review: Tuverel is a Japanese indie skincare brand that punches far above its price category. This glycylglycine lotion is especially popular among expats managing oily, congested skin in Japan's humidity. It won Best Cosme 2024 for a reason—pore refinement and sebum control are visible within 4 weeks. Labeling is Japanese-only, but the formula is straightforward (toner, apply daily). Best value skincare on this list.
